text: went to the doctor for a headache and left with 3 new things to worry about
my health insurance denied a claim because apparently breathing is a pre-existing condition
webmd told me i have 4 days to live but also maybe its just allergies
paying $200/month for a gym i havent been to since january
its 4am and im wide awake. gonna be real fun at work in 3 hours
havent drank water in 2 days. im basically beef jerky at this point
my step counter judged me today. 847 steps. most of them to the fridge
doctor said i need to reduce stress so now im stressed about reducing stress
insurance company put me on hold for 47 minutes then hung up on me
googled 'why does my elbow hurt' and now im writing my will
the gym emailed me saying they miss me. emotional manipulation tbh
fell asleep at 6pm woke up at 2am. my body is in a different timezone
bought a 64oz water bottle. drank from it once. its decorative now
fitbit vibrated at me to move and i threw it across the room. thats cardio right
went to urgent care for a splinter bc i have no idea what a real emergency is
my deductible is higher than my rent. cool cool cool
webmd symptom checker is just a horror choose your own adventure book
signed up for a 5am workout class as a joke and now the joke is my alarm
havent slept before midnight since 2019. my circadian rhythm left the chat
someone told me to drink 8 glasses of water and i felt personally attacked
my apple watch told me to stand up during a meeting. thanks for outing me
doctor asked how much i drink and i lied so fast it was almost impressive
health insurance is just a subscription service for disappointment
i diagnosed myself with 6 diseases before breakfast thanks to google
the gym parking lot is my meditation spot. i sit there then drive home
my sleep schedule is abstract art at this point
filled my water bottle at 9am. its 5pm and still full. growth.
got 10k steps today but only because i was lost in ikea for 3 hours
the blood pressure machine at cvs is my primary care physician
my insurance covers everything except the things i actually need
webmd rabbit hole at 3am is self care right
bought gym shoes 8 months ago. theyve only seen the inside of target
i sleep in 47 minute intervals like some kind of broken microwave
my coworker drinks a gallon of water a day and i find that threatening
step goal: 10000. actual steps: 2300. emotional damage: immeasurable
told the dentist i floss daily. we both knew. we both just sat there.
health insurance sent me a wellness newsletter. the irony could kill me but theyd deny that claim too
convinced i have a rare disease but its probably just sleeping weird on my arm
joined planet fitness for the pizza monday. no regrets tbh
went to bed at 10pm like an adult. woke up at 1am. stared at ceiling til 5. adulting.
my emotional support water bottle is empty and so am i
fitbit gave me a badge for walking to the mailbox. participation trophy energy
had a panic attack in the waiting room before the doctor even called my name
copay went up again. might just start googling my symptoms professionally
webmd said it could be stress. my student loans said same
the gym has my money and my dignity and i have neither
melatonin doesnt work on whatever demon possesses me at 3am
bought a brita filter and now i think im better than everyone
my watch says i burned 12 calories today. some of us are efficient ok
nurse asked me to rate my pain 1-10 and i said 'emotionally or physically'
insurance denied my mri. guess ill just vibe with this mystery lump
i have 74 tabs open on webmd. this is research not anxiety
cancelled gym membership. kept the keychain tag for the memories
my body runs on spite and 4 hours of sleep apparently
hydroflask fell in a meeting and everyone looked at me like i committed a crime
10k steps but my knees sound like bubble wrap now
went to the er for chest pain. it was gas. $800 gas.
out of network means out of luck apparently
googled headache causes and apparently i have been dead since tuesday
yoga mat has been rolled up in my trunk for 14 months. its aging like wine
fell asleep on the couch at 7pm. body said no to the bed tonight i guess
my pee is the color of apple juice. i know i need water. dont @ me
garmin said i was 'unproductive' today. bold words from a watch
doctor said eat more vegetables. i said does ketchup count. she did not laugh
prior authorization for medication took 3 weeks. cool im cured by rage now
self diagnosed via tiktok. my therapist was not impressed
gym said they cant cancel my membership without a notarized letter from god
been hitting snooze for 2 hours. at this point the alarm is ambient noise
drank a whole nalgene today. bladder hates me but at least im hydrated
my step counter resets at midnight and judges me all over again
walked into the doctors office and my blood pressure spiked from the vibes alone
insurance said my mental health visits are a luxury. luxury??? LUXURY????
webmd says i either have a cold or a brain tumor. no in between
peloton is now a very expensive coat rack. aesthetic tho
sleep schedule said bye in march 2020 and never came back
i carry a water bottle everywhere but drink from it never
walked 15k steps at disneyland. does suffering count as exercise
my doctor googled my symptoms in front of me. we are the same
hsa balance: $12. medical bill: $4000. math aint mathing
every symptom on webmd leads to the same 5 diseases and one of them is always cancer
free trial at the gym was a trap. now they have my soul and credit card
i function on 5 hours of sleep and pure delusion
forgot my water bottle at home. guess today i choose violence
step counter died at noon. all afternoon steps are lost to the void
waiting room magazines from 2019. reading about pre pandemic problems hits different
insurance requires a referral to see a specialist to get a referral. make it make sense
googled 'is it normal to' at 2am and the answer was always no
gym class schedule conflicts with my nap schedule so thats a no
woke up at 3am thinking about that weird mole. thanks brain
my hydration app sent 47 notifications today. im not thirsty im BUSY
hit 10k steps then rewarded myself with 4 hours on the couch. balance
phlebotomist said nice veins and thats the best compliment ive gotten all year
open enrollment feels like picking which way id like to go bankrupt
webmd should have a 'are you sure you want to keep reading' popup
gym buddy ghosted me. working out alone is just sad cardio now
havent seen a sunrise by choice. only by insomnia
sparkling water people are just water bottle people who leveled up
apple watch closed all my rings and i still feel empty inside
doctor said come back in 6 months. insurance said lol good luck
webmd university. class of every night at 2am
elliptical machine at the gym knows my deepest shame
sleep is just a suggestion my body chooses to ignore
